title: Move detailed setup UI from main page into subpages
goal: 메인 설정 페이지에서 제거한 상세 UI(개별 연결 카드, 권한 토글, 도구 설치 버튼, MCP 프리셋, 커스텀 커넥터)를 각 하위 페이지에 배치한다.

test_requirements.case: connections page shows Gmail and Calendar cards with Connect buttons
test_requirements.expected: individual service cards with OAuth connect/disconnect

test_requirements.case: connections page shows custom connectors section
permissions page shows all permission toggles
test_requirements.expected: grouped toggles: core, service, sensitive, advanced

test_requirements.case: tools page shows Playwright install section
tools page shows MCP presets section

constraints: Copy the relevant JSX from the original setup/page.tsx into each subpage
Each subpage must fetch its own data (getSetupStatus, getMcpPresets, etc.)
Each subpage must have its own state management (useState hooks)
Reuse existing API functions from lib/api.ts
Do not modify main setup page or backend
